tasks.subject: Task 1: Fix permission error messages to prevent enumeration
Task 2: Rename creatorIp to sessionId and sanitize HTTP errors
Task 3: Optimize custom link limit check (eliminate .collect())
Task 4: Guard localStorage and extract magic number constants
Task 5: Centralize domain references through url-utils
Task 7: Remove dead CSS and fix hardcoded colors in ErrorBoundary
Task 8: Add unit tests for convex/lib modules
Task 9: Add unit tests for frontend components
Task 10: Add unit tests for url-utils and cached-user
Task 11: Add skip-to-main-content link for a11y
Task 12: Add scope attributes to table headers
